name: Li Zhang
stories:
My parents spent almost their entire lives trying to develop a working tokamak.
After their first major success, they were immediately recruited to Europa to build a terraforming center.
A few years later, I was born. So, it turns out I'm as much of a native European as these monsters...

name: Li Tian
stories:
My wife and I developed the first tokamak prototype, capable of producing hydrogen from water and triggering a nuclear fusion reaction.
After successful tests and the launch of mass production, we were called upon to lead the terraforming of Europa.
Work progressed rapidly until an explosion occurred, releasing enormous amounts of energy...
My wife died immediately, but I managed to survive, escaping with severe burns.
Is our son alive?..
